overview: A Pinterest-style social platform for digital drawings where artists post, discover, like, save, download, and share artwork. Includes personalized suggestions and trending picks.
features: Post and share digital drawings with title, description, and tags
Browse a community feed of recent and trending drawings
Like, save, download, and share drawings
Personalized drawing suggestions based on your saved collection
User profiles with posted drawings and saved collections
Filter and search by tag or artist name
